claim: In the kosa, sense and source authority form one indivisible 'iti <authority>' unit.
loss: The TEI Lex-0 baseline splits 3 authority-bound sense group(s) into separate <def> + <bibl>; the indivisibility of the kosa iti-unit (a candidate Lex-0 ODD customisation) is not expressible in the baseline.
